title: Coin Change
coreIdea: Find the minimum number of coins needed to make a target amount, where each coin type can be used unlimited times. Build up the answer for smaller amounts first, using each as a stepping stone to larger amounts.
recognitionCues: unlimited use of each item allowed
minimize or count ways to reach a target sum
approach: Create a dp array of size (amount+1), initialized to infinity except dp[0]=0. For each amount from 1 to target, try every coin; if coin <= amount, dp[amount] = min(dp[amount], dp[amount-coin]+1). Return dp[amount] or -1 if still infinity.
